name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for MintCore

---

## Problem or Use Case

<!-- Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the use case that motivates this feature. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered and why they were ruled out. -->

## Impact on MintCore Users

<!-- How will this change benefit MintCore users? Are there any potential downsides? -->

## Breaking Change?

- [ ] This feature introduces a **breaking change**.

> If this is a breaking change, please read [VERSIONING.md](../../docs/VERSIONING.md) before submitting and describe the migration path in detail below.

<!-- If breaking: describe what changes consumers must make to their code. -->
